creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have built this on 12.3-RELEASE, 13.1-RELEASE, and 14-CURRENT, on amd64 and i386 without errors. Unable to reproduce the problem: This is a local site setup  problem.

What is uname -a?

Can you list make.conf.

What arguments did you pass to make?

What environment variables did you pass to make?

What other packages are installed?
